strategies.name: Inside Screen Drive with Backdoor Read
strategies.summary: Drive middle off an inside screen to collapse the 2-3 zone, then dump to a backdoor cutter on the weak side.
description: Set an inside screen to free the ball handler to drive middle, splitting the two top defenders of the 2-3 zone.
- Zone is sitting back and the top defenders are passive
- Weak-side bottom defender is ball-watching or cheating toward the paint
- You have a cutter who can time the backdoor run off the drive
- Middle is congested before you can read the dump
- Cutter is not ready or is being denied on the weak side
What it gives you: Layup off the drive if the lane stays open. Backdoor layup for the cutter if the weak-side defender collapses.
